title: Assistants
deleteConfirmationDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this assistant? This action cannot be undone.
name: Name
configurationPresetsDesc: Includes the original built-in default profile, a pure model fallback, no-thinking chat modes, long-form writing, and thinking-enabled reasoning presets.
instructionsDateHint: Tip: Use {{current_date}} to insert today’s date.
thinkingModeDesc: Controls whether llama.cpp thinking mode is forced for this assistant. Turn it off to avoid continuation errors with assistant response prefill.
streamModeDesc: Controls whether this assistant forces streaming responses or defers to the model default.
defaultAssistantDesc: Used when starting a new chat
